tuning: E A D G B E
content:
For the Intermediate/Advanced player.  Fun, romantic song.
Please enjoy!
~Shotty

[Intro:] (4x’s)
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]                     [ch]D#m7[/ch] 
   Before I let you go, before I let you go[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#m9[/ch]
   Can I get a kiss, goodnight, baby [/tab]
 
[Verse 1:]  
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]         [ch]D#m7[/ch]           [ch]C#m9[/ch]
  Lately, I've been thinking something's going wrong[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]D#m7[/ch]     
 'Cause you got an attitude[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#m9[/ch]   
 And you're not in the mood like you used to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]                [ch]C#m9[/ch]
  Girl, I can feel it when I hold you in my arms[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Emaj7[/ch]         [ch]D#m7[/ch]     
  The feeling is not the same[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m9[/ch]
  Can I be the one to blame?[/tab]
 
[BRIDGE:]
[tab]               [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]  [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 I don't wanna lose your  love,       mmm[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]  [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 I don't wanna say    bye-bye,  oh no no[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]  [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]  
 True love is so hard to    find[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G#m7[/ch]                        [ch]C#m9[/ch]     [ch]D#7[/ch]
 And it's right between your lips and mine, and mine[/tab]


[Chorus:] (2x’s)
[tab]     [ch]Emaj7[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]C#m9[/ch]
   Before I let you go away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Emaj7[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]     [ch]C#m9[/ch]
   Can I get kiss goodnite[/tab]

[Verse 2:]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]                  [ch]D#m7[/ch]     
  Turn the lights down low[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m9[/ch]
 Let's take it nice and slow[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]D#m7[/ch]     
 My mission is to keep you mine[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m9[/ch]  
 Don't want this to be the last time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]             [ch]D#m7[/ch]     
 We’ll make sweet love baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m9[/ch]
   I know you feel it, too[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Emaj7[/ch]       [ch]D#m7[/ch]    
 It's bigger than the both of us[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m9[/ch]
 There's one thing I'm so certain of[/tab]

[BRIDGE:]
[tab]               [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]  [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 I don't wanna lose your  love,       [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]  [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 I don't wanna say    bye-bye,  oh no no[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]  [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 It's always the little     things, I remember[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C#m9[/ch]
 And I can't just let it slip away[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D#7[/ch]
 Slip away[/tab]
 
[Chorus:] (2x’s)
[tab]     [ch]Emaj7[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]C#m9[/ch]
   Before I let you go away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Emaj7[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]     [ch]C#m9[/ch]
   Can I get kiss goodnite[/tab]

[VERSE 3:]
[tab]                                       [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]
 Teddy, won't you play the music for me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]             [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 Teddy, won't you play Backstreet sang?[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]    [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]     [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 Baby I get so lonely sometimes,       I-----[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]D#sus7/A#[/ch]
 Baby my heart is broken sometimes[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D#7/A#[/ch]                  [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 I need you right now, I don't...[/tab]
                       C#m9                 D#7/A# (stab 3x's)
 I can't let you slip away-----, slip away------

[CHORUS:] (with ad-lib lyrics)
[tab]                         [ch]Emaj7[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]C#m9[/ch]               
 Before I let go------(Before I let you go away) baby, baby[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Emaj7[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m9[/ch]
 (Can I get a kiss goodni-----ight) I don't see it being a problem[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]Emaj7[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]
 If I just get one little bitty kiss baby (Before I let you go away)[/tab]
[tab]                                                       [ch]Emaj7[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m9[/ch]
 I just can't let you get away, oh yeah...(can I get a kiss goodni-----ight)[/tab]

[PRE-OUTRO:] (with ad-lib lyrics)
[tab]                                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                     [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Ah yeah, before I let you go--ho--ho-- (Before I let you go, before I let you go) [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m9[/ch]
(Can I get a kiss, goodnight, baby) Lord, have mercy...[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                    [ch]D#m7[/ch]
See I wanna know (Before I let you go, before I let you go)[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]C#m9[/ch]
I-----gotta have one kiss goodnight (Can I get a kiss, goodnight, baby)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                    [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Don't say bye bye (Before I let you go, before I let you go) [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m9[/ch]
pleeee---ase (Can I get a kiss, goodnight, baby)[/tab]

[OUTRO:]
[tab][ch]Amaj9[/ch]                     [ch]G#m7[/ch]
   I don't want lose your sweet love[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m9[/ch]      [ch]F#m9/B[/ch]       [ch]G#maj9[/ch]
   So don't say good-bye, say     good-night[/tab]
